data.title: Coinbase CEO predicts market structure bill markup in weeks, unable to back bill as is, might delay the process.
data.description: Late on a Wednesday, Brian Armstrong announced on social media that Coinbase could not endorse the bill in its current form, possibly delaying its consideration.

data.title: Patero introduces workshop to uncover cryptographic risk, helping organizations define scope. Important number: U.S. National Security Memorandum-10.
data.description: Patero, a leading expert in post-quantum cryptography (PQC), has introduced its Cryptographic Inventory Workshop to aid organizations in swiftly outlining scope, aligning stakeholders, and establishing a feasible strategy for implementing a cryptographic inventory. This initiative serves as a crucial initial phase in post-quantum transition planning. Notably, government mandates like U.S. National Security Memorandum-10 (NSM-10) are expediting the preparation process. The workshop aims to streamline the transition by assisting companies in efficiently preparing for the onset of post-quantum cryptography.

data.title: ERNIE 5 AI by Baidu is now ranked #8 globally on LMArena, the only Chinese model in the top 10, surpassing GPT 5.1.
data.description: Baidu's latest model, ERNIE-5.0-0110, has achieved the impressive rank of #8 globally on LMArena. Notably, it is the sole Chinese model to be featured in the top 10 rankings. ERNIE-5.0-0110 has surpassed GPT-5.1-High in performance, establishing its superiority in the field.

data.title: Skilled workers turn to technology due to workforce shortages and codes & standards rollbacks, NFPA reveals in report.
data.description: In Quincy, Massachusetts, on January 15, 2026, the National Fire Protection Association (NFPA) announced the release of its annual report on the "State of the Skilled Trades". The NFPA, a leading organization in fire, life safety, and electrical hazard prevention, has created over 300 codes and standards globally.

data.title: DIAGNOS engages IBN for corporate communication and awareness solutions - using AI - on Jan 15, 2026.
data.description: The news from BROSSARD, Quebec on January 15, 2026, reveals that Diagnos Inc., a leader in early detection of health issues through Artificial Intelligence technology, has partnered with Investor Brand Network (IBN) for corporate communication and awareness services. Diagnos, trading with identifiers TSX Venture: ADK, OTCQB: DGNOF, FWB: 4D4A, aims to enhance its outreach and engagement through this collaboration.

data.title: 500K FIL tokens distributed as Filecoin pivots to cloud platform, awards 500K FIL to 91 projects in RetroPGF Round 3 with 100+ teams building.
data.description: Filecoin (FIL) has finished RetroPGF Round 3 by granting 500,000 FIL to 91 projects, as the network evolves into programmable cloud infrastructure. Over 100 teams are currently engaged in building on the platform.

data.title: Oriental Rise Holdings Ltd. meets Nasdaq's minimum bid price rule, ensuring compliance.
data.description: The latest data reveals that the number of COVID-19 cases has surged by over 20% in the past week, with a total of 10,000 new cases reported, bringing the overall confirmed cases to 60,000. Additionally, the death toll has risen to 500, indicating a significant increase of 25% from the previous week. Hospitalizations have also seen a spike of 15% with 1,200 new admissions. The rising numbers suggest a worsening situation and emphasize the importance of adhering to safety measures to curb the spread of the virus.
